title: Output Validation Error Templates
description: Error messages for output validation failures

FILE_NOT_CREATED.hint: Agent should have created this file. Check agent logs for errors.
FILE_NOT_CREATED.recovery: Re-run the command or manually create the file

FILE_TOO_SMALL.message: File {{file_path}} is too small ({{size}} chars). Minimum: {{min_size}} chars.
FILE_TOO_SMALL.hint: The file may be incomplete or missing content
FILE_TOO_SMALL.recovery: Re-run the command with more detailed requirements

MISSING_REQUIRED_SECTION.hint: The file must contain all required sections
MISSING_REQUIRED_SECTION.recovery: Manually add the section or re-run the command

QUALITY_THRESHOLD_NOT_MET.hint: Review output for completeness and accuracy
QUALITY_THRESHOLD_NOT_MET.recovery: Run verification command to identify specific issues

INSUFFICIENT_USER_STORIES.hint: Add more user stories to cover all use cases
INSUFFICIENT_USER_STORIES.recovery: Re-run with request for more comprehensive user stories

INSUFFICIENT_ACCEPTANCE_CRITERIA.hint: Define clear, testable acceptance criteria for all requirements

NO_STANDARDS_REFERENCED.hint: Reference relevant coding standards, API patterns, or testing guidelines

MISSING_DIAGRAMS.message: No diagrams found in {{file_path}}. Expected at least {{min_count}}
MISSING_DIAGRAMS.hint: Add architecture, sequence, or ERD diagrams using mermaid syntax
MISSING_DIAGRAMS.recovery: Add mermaid diagrams to visualize architecture and flows

INSUFFICIENT_API_ENDPOINTS.hint: Define all necessary API endpoints with request/response schemas
INSUFFICIENT_API_ENDPOINTS.recovery: Review requirements and add missing endpoints

INSUFFICIENT_TEST_COVERAGE.hint: Add more unit tests, integration tests, or E2E tests
INSUFFICIENT_TEST_COVERAGE.recovery: Write additional tests to cover untested code paths

TESTS_FAILING.hint: Fix failing tests before considering implementation complete
TESTS_FAILING.recovery: Review test failures and fix implementation or test code

LINT_ERRORS.hint: Fix code style issues to maintain consistency
LINT_ERRORS.recovery: Run linter with auto-fix or manually fix violations

TYPE_ERRORS.hint: Fix type annotations and type safety issues
TYPE_ERRORS.recovery: Fix type errors to ensure type safety

BUILD_FAILED.hint: Review build errors and fix compilation issues
BUILD_FAILED.recovery: Fix syntax errors, missing dependencies, or build configuration

ACCESSIBILITY_VIOLATIONS.hint: Fix WCAG violations to ensure accessibility
ACCESSIBILITY_VIOLATIONS.recovery: Run accessibility audit and fix violations (missing alt text, ARIA labels, etc.)

INCOMPLETE_TASKS.hint: All tasks must be completed before verification
INCOMPLETE_TASKS.recovery: Complete remaining tasks or remove unnecessary tasks

MISSING_DOCUMENTATION.recovery: Add API docs, code comments, or README documentation

SECURITY_VULNERABILITY.recovery: Address security vulnerability (SQL injection, XSS, etc.)
